mapper.select: SELECT v.id as videoId, v.topic as videoName, vw.watch_time as watchTime, vw.last_watch_time as lastWatchTime FROM video_watch_record vw LEFT JOIN videos v ON vw.video_id = v.id WHERE vw.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY vw.last_watch_time DESC

SELECT u.id as userId, u.user_name as userName, vw.watch_time as watchTime, vw.last_watch_time as lastWatchTime FROM video_watch_record vw LEFT JOIN user u ON vw.user_id = u.id WHERE vw.video_total_id = #{videoTotalId} ORDER BY u.user_name

SELECT u.id as userId, u.user_name as userName, vw.totalWatchTime FROM (SELECT user_id, SUM(watch_time) as totalWatchTime FROM video_watch_record GROUP BY user_id ) vw LEFT JOIN user u ON vw.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user_class uc ON u.id = uc.user_id WHERE uc.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY vw.totalWatchTime DESC
